title: Group alternatives in regular expressions when used with anchors
description: In regular expressions, anchors have higher precedence than the | operator. To avoid misunderstanding the precedence or changing it, a non-capturing group should be used around the alternatives.
recommendation: Use non-capturing groups around alternatives in regular expressions with anchors.
impact: Avoids potential security vulnerabilities due to misuse of regular expressions.

checks.message: Group alternatives in regular expressions when used with anchors. Pattern should use parentheses like '^(hello|world)$' instead of '^hello|world$'
